security_findings.title: Lack of Comprehensive Testing in Cart Management System
security_findings.detail: The `cartManager` class, while functional, lacks thorough testing which could lead to issues when handling multiple products or complex cart operations.

debt_findings.title: Potential for Code Duplication in Navigation and Dark Mode Handling
debt_findings.detail: The navigation bar and dark mode toggle functionalities are duplicated across multiple HTML pages, which could be consolidated to reduce redundancy.

next_actions: Capture real product-scope code changes before treating this run as an improvement or gold training example.
Consider refactoring the navigation and dark mode toggling logic to a shared utility file or module to reduce code duplication.
Implement unit tests for the `cartManager` class, focusing on edge cases such as adding multiple products and handling concurrent users.
